title: Skill catalog (skills/registry.yaml)
description: Formalizes the EXISTING shape of skills/registry.yaml (plan §4.1 Facet B / §6). Source-of-truth for WHICH skills are default-bound per role + their provenance; vendored content lives under skills/vendored/<id>/ and is pinned + integrity-locked by skills/skills.lock. Normative discipline is process/role-skill-model.md + process/role-configuration-contract.md. HARD: vendored + pinned, NO runtime fetch; tool_requirements ⊆ role whitelist; redistributable license + upstream LICENSE retained; Acceptance skill change ⇒ recalibrate (Constitution §3.6).

role_defaults.description: The 'default config': skill ids bound to each role unless the charter overrides. Keys are the 5 chain roles (registry uses code_reviewer).

skills.description: Vendored skills (committed under skills/vendored/, pinned in skills.lock).

authored.description: Authored (non-vendored) exemplars already in repo; normative source in templates/.

candidates.description: Evaluated, NOT vendored. Recorded for traceability + opt-in.

source_ref.description: Upstream source pointer. repo=local for authored/in-repo skills.

normative_source.description: For authored skills: the templates/ or process/ file that is the single source of truth.

license.description: Redistributable license id (e.g. MIT) or 'aidazi' for authored.

tool_requirements.description: Tools the skill needs. MUST be ⊆ the bound role's tool whitelist (role-skill-model.md §4 constraint #1). [] = read-only safe.

calibration_coupled.description: §3.6: changing/updating this invalidates acceptance `calibrated`. Set true for advanced-evaluation.
